features.name: verilator split_var attribute on wire with self-referential concatenation
features.description: Code should include a multi-bit wire with the verilator split_var attribute and a self-referential concatenation assignment where the wire's LSB is fed back
features.snippet:
wire [1:0] w /*verilator split_var*/;
assign w = {w[0], a};

features.name: unpacked wire self-referential concatenation assignment
features.description: Code should include an unpacked wire with a self-referential concatenation assignment pattern where wire[0] appears on the RHS inside concatenation
